preferred.lessons: คอร์สเรียน

preferred.Learn More: ดูเพิ่มเติม

tone: friendly-professional, second-person, conversational. No exclamation marks. No emoji. Avoid marketing-speak inflation.
formality: Polite (สุภาพ). Use formal vocabulary but keep sentence length natural and readable. Avoid the spoken particles ครับ/ค่ะ except where directly addressing the reader as a CTA. Do not over-translate Anglicisms that Thai golfers use natively (กรีน, แฟร์เวย์, สวิง are familiar Thai golf terms — keep them rather than forcing pure Thai equivalents).
preserve: All numerals (do not translate to Thai numerals)
